name: Bennett University
overview: Bennett University is a private, UGC-approved institution established by The Times Group. It focuses on globally benchmarked, research-driven, and industry-aligned education with strong emphasis on innovation, AI, and experiential learning.

keyFacts.campusSize: 68 acres in Tech Zone 2, Greater Noida
keyFacts.chancellor: Vineet Jain (Managing Director, The Times Group)

schools.name: School of Computer Science Engineering & Technology
School of Management
programs: MBA (Marketing, Finance, HR, Analytics, Entrepreneurship, Family Business, Healthcare Management)

schools.name: School of Global Pathways
programs: 2+2 B.Tech CSE with University of Birmingham

campusFacilities: Innovation hubs and Centres of Excellence

policies: Entry timings and attendance are enforced

admissions.scholarships: Merit-based scholarships up to 100% for high performers (JEE/SAT/CUET and other exams)

placements.internships: Stipends can reach high amounts (e.g., INR 4+ lakhs/month in select cases)
placements.focus: Industry readiness via The Times Group network and advisory boards

researchAndInnovation.grantsAndPatents: Significant grants with patents filed and granted
